## Quality checklist

- [ ] Every code sample compiles and runs (no pseudo-code, no TODOs)
- [ ] Companion code added/updated under `examples/` and is tested
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`, `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`, `cargo test` pass
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Benchmarks (if any) come from a runnable binary, run in `--release`
- [ ] Both English and Português versions included
- [ ] All required lesson sections present (theory → references)
